name: Spicy Gingerbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a 9 x 13 inch pan.
2. Cream the shortening and sugar until smooth.
3. Add 2 well-beaten egg yolks to the mixture.
4. Gradually add molasses and stir continuously.
5. Sift together flour, salt, and spices.
6. Dissolve baking soda in boiling water.
7. Alternately add the baking soda and water mixture with the flour to the creamed mixture.
8. Gently fold in the stiffly beaten egg whites.
9. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes.
10. Serve hot with whipped cream for dessert.
